brand.name: vinex22-travels
brand.style: Apple.com inspired premium D2C travel-essentials brand. Photorealistic, cinematic editorial photography, magazine-cover quality. Minimalist composition with generous negative space, soft natural light, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain. Neutral palette: warm whites, charcoal, deep navy, sand, burnt sienna accents. Premium materials: brushed aluminum, waxed canvas, full-grain leather, merino wool, ripstop nylon. No people in product shots; lifestyle shots may include people but faces should be away from camera, in shadow, or out of focus. Avoid stock-photo look — always editorial, always considered.
brand.branding_clause: BRANDING: include a small, discreet 'vinex22' wordmark on the product, rendered in clean lowercase sans-serif typography (Inter or Helvetica style). The wordmark must be small (no larger than 5% of the frame), positioned subtly — debossed into leather patches, etched into brushed aluminum, embroidered on canvas/nylon, or printed on a small woven label or zipper pull. Never bold, never centered, never a hero element. Spell exactly: vinex22 (lowercase, no spaces, no hyphen). No other text, no other logos, no other brand marks. The wordmark is the only text allowed in the image.
brand.no_branding_clause: No text of any kind, no typography, no logos, no watermarks, no brand marks anywhere in the image.

hero.purpose: Full-bleed homepage and category landing heroes

product.purpose: Product card images on neutral seamless backdrop

texture.purpose: Material and detail close-ups for storytelling sections

campaign.purpose: Editorial campaign hero scenes for the homepage and brand-story sections

backdrop-wide.purpose: Landscape parallax backdrops for hero, section dividers, and footer

backdrop-tall.purpose: Portrait parallax backdrops for stacked sections and editorial column blocks

product-color.purpose: Per-color product variants for the color picker on PDP

product-lineup.purpose: All-color lineup hero shot per product, Apple gallery style

images.prompt: A single charcoal-grey aluminum-frame carry-on suitcase standing alone on a polished concrete floor in a sun-drenched modern airport terminal. Soft golden-hour light streaming through floor-to-ceiling windows. Strong directional shadow. Wide cinematic composition with massive negative space above. Editorial product photography. No people, no text, no logos.

A premium memory-foam neck pillow in soft cream cashmere resting on a folded charcoal wool airline blanket. Placed on a window-seat tray table with blurred clouds visible through the airplane window. Warm cabin lighting, shallow depth of field. Cinematic editorial composition with negative space on the right. No people, no text, no logos.

An overhead flat-lay of three open packing cubes in deep navy ripstop fabric, neatly filled with rolled white linen shirts and folded denim. Arranged on a warm oak wood surface. Soft diffused window light from the left. Minimalist editorial styling, ample negative space. No people, no text, no logos.

A hanging open toiletry organizer in burnt-sienna waxed canvas with brass hardware, containing a few small unbranded amber glass bottles and a folded white linen washcloth. Hung on a hook against a textured travertine bathroom wall. Soft warm lighting, shallow depth of field. Cinematic editorial. No people, no text, no logos.

A flat-lay arrangement of a deep-navy cable organizer roll partially unrolled, revealing braided cables, a slim brushed-aluminum power bank, and a compact universal travel adapter. On a charcoal slate surface with a single soft overhead light. Minimalist Apple-style product composition with strong negative space. No people, no text, no logos.

Three carry-on suitcases of different sizes (cabin, medium, large) arranged in a clean row at slight angles, in matte charcoal, deep navy, and warm sand colors. Studio seamless white background. Soft even lighting with subtle shadow. Editorial product lineup. No people, no text, no logos.

A neat arrangement of a cream cashmere neck pillow, a charcoal silk sleep mask, and a folded merino travel blanket on a warm oak surface. Soft natural side lighting. Editorial flat-lay with breathing room. No people, no text, no logos.

Five packing cubes in graduated sizes, deep navy ripstop nylon, stacked diagonally on a soft beige linen surface. Soft top-down lighting. Minimalist editorial composition. No people, no text, no logos.

A sand-colored hard-shell suitcase standing on a wooden boardwalk over a beach at golden hour, ocean waves softly visible in background. Warm side light, long shadow. Cinematic editorial composition with negative space. No people, no text, no logos.

Extreme close-up macro shot of a brushed aluminum suitcase corner showing the radial grain pattern, a polished chrome rivet, and the edge of a hard-shell panel. Soft directional lighting that emphasizes the brushed texture. Editorial detail photography. No people, no text, no logos.

Cinematic editorial campaign image for a premium travel-essentials brand. A traveler shot from behind walks across an empty sunlit airport apron toward a waiting jet at sunrise, pulling a charcoal aluminum carry-on suitcase. Long shadow stretches across the tarmac. Warm golden-hour light, deep blue sky, lens flare. Composition leaves the upper third as negative space (sky). The traveler is small in frame to emphasize scale. Inspired by Apple product launch and luxury hospitality advertising. No faces visible, no text, no logos, no airline branding.

Cinematic editorial campaign image for a premium travel-essentials brand. Wide interior shot of a serene minimalist mountain cabin at dusk: a cream cashmere neck pillow rests on a folded merino blanket on a low oak bench by a floor-to-ceiling window. Snowy mountains visible outside in soft alpenglow. Warm interior lighting from a single brass pendant. Strong negative space, magazine-spread quality. Inspired by luxury hospitality campaigns. No people, no text, no logos.

Cinematic landscape photograph of a vast alpine ridgeline at dawn. Snow-dusted granite peaks recede into soft pink and powder-blue mist. Foreground shows out-of-focus pine boughs. Wide aspect, generous sky, painterly atmosphere, subtle film grain. National Geographic editorial quality. No people, no man-made objects, no text.

Cinematic landscape photograph of a wet airport tarmac at dusk after rain. Distant silhouette of a parked jet, runway lights reflecting in puddles, deep teal sky with low golden horizon. Atmospheric, moody, painterly. Wide cinematic aspect. No people, no airline livery, no text, no logos.

Cinematic aerial landscape of a winding coastal road carved into atlantic-blue cliffs. Soft morning haze, distant headlands fading to pale grey, narrow ribbon of asphalt with no cars. Editorial travel magazine quality. Wide aspect. No people, no text, no logos.

Cinematic aerial cloudscape photographed from a window seat at golden hour. Layered cumulus illuminated from the side, deep blue stratosphere above, soft amber horizon. Painterly, dreamlike, magazine-cover quality. Wide aspect. No aircraft visible, no text, no logos.

Cinematic editorial photograph of a quiet luxury hotel balcony at dawn. Linen curtains drift in soft breeze, pale wooden floor, distant mountain range visible through the open doorway in soft morning haze. Warm natural light. Strong negative space. Architectural Digest quality. No people, no text, no logos.

Cinematic skyline photograph of a refined Asian metropolis at blue hour. Glass towers reflect cool blue twilight, scattered warm window lights, low river in foreground catching reflections. Muted desaturated palette, editorial travel magazine quality. Wide cinematic aspect. No text, no readable signage, no logos.

Cinematic landscape of wind-rippled sand dunes at late afternoon. Long curving shadow lines, single set of soft footprints disappearing toward distant ridge, warm apricot and umber tones. Painterly, minimalist, National Geographic quality. Wide aspect. No people visible, no text, no logos.

Cinematic landscape of a misty pine forest at dawn. Tall slender trunks recede into soft volumetric light, fern undergrowth, cool green palette with golden shafts of sun breaking through. Atmospheric, painterly. Wide aspect. No people, no man-made objects, no text.

Cinematic landscape of a glassy alpine lake at dawn with perfect mirror reflection of surrounding snow-dusted peaks. Pale pink sky, total stillness, single wisp of mist on the water. Painterly, meditative. Wide aspect. No people, no boats, no text, no logos.

Cinematic landscape view through a moving train window of European countryside in summer. Soft motion blur on rolling green fields and distant farmhouses, sharp focus on the lower edge of the window frame. Warm afternoon light. Editorial travel quality. Wide aspect. No people, no text, no logos.

Cinematic night landscape of a snowy mountain ridge under a vivid green and violet aurora borealis. Deep navy sky scattered with stars, snow softly catching the auroral glow. Painterly, awe-inspiring, National Geographic quality. Wide aspect. No people, no man-made objects, no text.

Cinematic vertical landscape photograph of a single rustic timber cabin nestled deep in a snowy pine forest at dusk. Warm amber glow from the cabin window, soft falling snow, towering dark pines framing the composition top to bottom. Painterly, atmospheric, magazine-cover quality. Tall portrait aspect. No people visible, no text, no logos.

No people, no airline livery, no text, no logos.

Several moored sailboats with reflections shimmering in still water, distant lanterns casting warm pools of light on the dock, deep teal sky transitioning to lavender. Tall portrait aspect, painterly, editorial travel quality. No people, no text, no readable signage, no logos.

Cinematic vertical landscape of a lone figure (shot from behind, very small in frame) walking along a wind-swept snowy ridge under heavy overcast sky. Near-monochrome palette of soft greys and whites, painterly, contemplative, awe-inspiring. Tall portrait aspect. Face not visible, no text, no logos.
